name: documents_v2
notes: Queried by FallbackSearchProvider with a case-insensitive ILIKE pattern match on the name column: WHERE name ILIKE '%{query}%' ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC.
All columns are returned via SELECT *; the full row (id, name, file_type, file_path, tags, uploaded_at, uploaded_by) is passed back to the client as each search result item.
